tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Pretty lies dripping from your velvet tongue
Every word a weapon but I'm not the one
You paint the sky in shades of black and blue
I was the remedy but you chose the wound

[Pre-Chorus]
Sugar-coated venom in a crystal glass
Every kiss a warning that I let pass
Touch me like you mean it then you disappear
Velvet poison running through my veins

[Chorus]
Velvet poison, I can taste it on my lips
Velvet poison, dripping from your fingertips
You're the beautiful disaster that I can't resist
Velvet poison, one more sip, one more kiss

[Verse 2]
Cigarette smoke memories I can't erase
Your shadow on my ceiling, your name I can't replace
Midnight conversations turning into war
You always leave me wanting something more

[Pre-Chorus]
Sugar-coated venom in a crystal glass
Every kiss a warning that I let pass
Touch me like you mean it then you disappear
Velvet poison running through my veins

[Chorus]
Velvet poison, I can taste it on my lips
Velvet poison, dripping from your fingertips
You're the beautiful disaster that I can't resist
Velvet poison, one more sip, one more kiss

[Bridge]
I know you're no good for me
But darling can't you see
The darker that you burn
The more I want to bleed

[Outro]
Velvet poison, velvet poison
Your love's the sweetest way to break

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ella llega y todo se prende
El flow que tiene no se vende
Mueve la cintura como quiere
La noche es suya, nadie la detiene

[Pre-Chorus]
Dale movimiento, dale sin parar
Fuego que se siente hasta el final

Fuego eterno, quema lento
Tú me tienes perdido en el momento

Baby ven aquí dame tu aliento

Bailamos hasta que se muera el invierno

Fuego que se siente hasta el final
Tú y yo solitos en la oscuridad

Fuego eterno, quema lento
Tú me tienes perdido en el momento

Baby ven aquí dame tu aliento

No pares, no pares
Que la noche es joven todavía

Fuego hasta que llegue el día

[Outro]
Fuego eterno, fuego eterno
Quema lento, quema lento

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
We were dancing in the neon haze
Your eyes like starlight in the purple rain
The city sleeps but we're still wide awake
Everything we touch begins to change

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't want to come back down
I don't want to hit the ground
Just hold me in this electric sound

[Chorus]
Neon haze, we're glowing in the dark
Neon haze, you set fire to my heart
Lost in the colors that we make
Living in a neon haze
Neon haze

[Verse 2]
Graffiti walls and rooftop afternoons
Your mixtape playing in my empty room
We said forever like it was easy to do
Now every street sign reminds me of you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't want to come back down
I don't want to hit the ground
Just hold me in this electric sound

[Chorus]
Neon haze, we're glowing in the dark
Neon haze, you set fire to my heart
Lost in the colors that we make
Living in a neon haze
Neon haze

[Bridge]
Maybe we were just a flicker
But we burned so bright
Maybe love is just a shimmer
In the city light

[Outro]
Neon haze, neon haze
Still glowing, still glowing

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Five AM alarm, no snooze button
Cold water on my face, I'm about something
While they sleeping I'm out here building
Stack the vision, brick by brick to the ceiling

[Pre-Chorus]
They said it couldn't be done
Watch me prove every single one
Started from the basement to the penthouse floor
Hungry for the empire, always wanting more

[Chorus]
Empire builder, I don't stop
From the bottom, climbing to the top
Empire builder, watch me rise
Discipline and fire in my eyes
Empire builder, no days off
Every setback made me level up
Empire builder, this is mine
Built the dream one day at a time

[Verse 2]
Laptop open, spreadsheets and the strategy
Books on the nightstand, mastering the craft in me
No excuses, just results and consistency
Turned my passion into generational legacy

[Chorus]
Empire builder, I don't stop
From the bottom, climbing to the top
Empire builder, watch me rise
Discipline and fire in my eyes
Empire builder, no days off
Every setback made me level up
Empire builder, this is mine
Built the dream one day at a time

[Bridge]
Money comes but money goes
Character is what I chose
Building empires, planting seeds
Watch the garden that I grow

[Outro]
Empire builder, empire builder
One day at a time
One day at a time
